children.heading: Unfair or deceptive act or practice
children.label: a Unfair or deceptive act or practice
children.text: A violation of this chapter shall be treated as a violation of a rule defining an unfair or deceptive act or practice prescribed under section 18(a)(1)(B) of the Federal Trade Commission Act ().15 U.S.C. 57a(a)(1)(B)

children.heading: Actions by the Commission
children.label: b Actions by the Commission
children.text: The Commission shall enforce this chapter in the same manner, by the same means, and with the same jurisdiction, powers, and duties as though all applicable terms and provisions of the Federal Trade Commission Act ( et seq.) were incorporated into and made a part of this chapter.15 U.S.C. 41
